allow: Bash(git commit -m 'fix\(hermes\): preserve ms365 OAuth token across pod restarts *)
Bash(ls -la "//wsl.localhost/Ubuntu/home/jelle/repos/home-assitant" 2>/dev/null || echo "PATH NOT ACCESSIBLE via this form")
Bash(wsl -d ubuntu -- bash -lc 'cd ~/repos/gitops && git log --oneline -6 && echo "---LZ---" && ls landingzones/zeus/')

Bash(wsl -d ubuntu -- bash -lc 'kubectl get pods -n zeus; echo "---"; kubectl get application zeus -n argocd -o custom-columns=NAME:.metadata.name,SYNC:.status.sync.status,HEALTH:.status.health.status')
Bash(wsl -d ubuntu -- bash -lc 'kubectl logs -n zeus deploy/zeus --tail=40 2>&1')

Bash(wsl -d ubuntu -- bash -lc 'cd ~/repos/gitops && echo "=== existing dashboard configmaps in repo ===" && grep -rl "grafana_dashboard" --include=*.yaml . 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo; echo "=== grep dashboard json files ===" && find . -path ./node_modules -prune -o -name "*dashboard*" -print 2>/dev/null | head -20')

Bash(wsl -d ubuntu -- bash -lc 'kubectl get cm -A -l grafana_dashboard=1 2>/dev/null | head; echo "---sidecar label search---"; kubectl get deploy -n observability kube-prometheus-stack-grafana -o yaml 2>/dev/null | grep -iA2 "LABEL\\|FOLDER" | head -30')

Bash(wsl -d ubuntu -- bash -lc 'kubectl get deploy -n observability kube-prometheus-stack-grafana -o yaml 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "SEARCH_NAMESPACE|FOLDER_ANNOTATION|NAMESPACE" | head -20; echo "---datasource uid---"; kubectl get cm -n observability -l grafana_datasource=1 -o jsonpath="{.items[*].metadata.name}" 2>/dev/null')

Bash(wsl -d ubuntu -- bash -lc 'echo "=== actual metrics exported by zeus ==="; kubectl exec -n zeus deploy/zeus -- python -c "import urllib.request; print\(urllib.request.urlopen\(\\"http://localhost:9000/metrics\\"\).read\(\).decode\(\)\)" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "^zeus_|^# HELP zeus" | head -60')

Bash(wsl -d ubuntu -- bash -lc 'kubectl get cm -n observability kube-prometheus-stack-grafana-datasource -o jsonpath="{.data}" 2>/dev/null | head -c 800; echo; echo "=== zeus app destination ==="; kubectl get application zeus -n argocd -o jsonpath="{.spec.destination}{\\"\\n\\"}{.spec.source.path}{\\"\\n\\"}"; echo "=== observability landing zone in repo? ==="; cd ~/repos/gitops && ls landingzones/ 2>/dev/null')

Bash(wsl -d ubuntu -- bash -lc 'proj=$\(kubectl get application zeus -n argocd -o jsonpath="{.spec.project}"\); echo "project=$proj"; kubectl get appproject $proj -n argocd -o jsonpath="{.spec.destinations}{\\"\\n\\"}" 2>/dev/null')

Bash(wsl -d ubuntu -- bash -lc 'cd ~/repos/gitops && echo "=== zeus templates ===" && ls -la landingzones/zeus/templates/ && echo "=== values \(metrics/dashboard region\) ===" && grep -nA3 -iE "metrics|servicemonitor|dashboard|grafana" landingzones/zeus/values.yaml')

Bash(wsl -d ubuntu -- bash -lc 'kubectl get deploy -n observability kube-prometheus-stack-grafana -o json | jq -r ".spec.template.spec.containers[] | select\(.name|test\(\\"sc-dashboard\\"\)\) | .env[] | \\"\\\(.name\)=\\\(.value // .valueFrom\)\\""')

Bash(wsl -d ubuntu -- bash -lc 'cd ~/repos/gitops && echo "=== json valid? ===" && jq empty landingzones/zeus/dashboards/zeus.json && echo OK && echo "=== helm template ===" && helm template zeus landingzones/zeus --show-only templates/dashboard.yaml > /tmp/zeus-dash.yaml 2>&1 && head -15 /tmp/zeus-dash.yaml && echo "..." && echo "=== embedded json valid? ===" && yq -r ".data[\\"zeus.json\\"]" /tmp/zeus-dash.yaml | jq empty && echo "EMBEDDED-JSON-OK"')

Bash(wsl -d ubuntu -- bash -lc 'cd ~/repos/gitops && helm template zeus landingzones/zeus --show-only templates/dashboard.yaml 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,yaml,json; d=yaml.safe_load\(sys.stdin\); j=json.loads\(d[\\"data\\"][\\"zeus.json\\"]\); print\(\\"panels:\\", len\(j[\\"panels\\"]\), \\"| uid:\\", j[\\"uid\\"], \\"| title:\\", j[\\"title\\"]\)"')
Bash(wsl -d ubuntu -- bash -lc 'cd ~/repos/gitops && git status --short landingzones/zeus/')
